channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 7th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been here for a week and still not collected. It's getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again, 7th June
item.description:
Flytipping again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Arnhem Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 rubbish bin bags split and spilled out with cans and dog poo bangs on the pavement, 7th June
item.description:
The two bags have been opened, probably by foxes, food, drinks cans pushed into the road squashed by passing cars and debris all around the bus stop, very unhygienic..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree leaves in the way of pavement, 7th June
item.description:
Tree leaves in the way of pavement And grass needs cutting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Velde Way, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree leaves in the way of pavement, 7th June
item.description:
Tree leaves in the way of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calton Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Dumped pallets, 7th June
item.description:
Needs disposal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside nos. 52-60, 7th June
item.description:
There is lots of flytipping on the pavement between 52-60 Alexandra Drive. Some has been reported multiple times. Stuff just isn’t being picked up around here and the streets are filthy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Alexandra Drive, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree branches and broken sign, 7th June
item.description:
Large tree branches have fallen and broken the footpath sign at the footpath junction on the Dollis Brook path, not far from where the path joins Gordon Road at the Eversleigh Road junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eversleigh Road, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corrugated rubbish dumped dangerously., 7th June
item.description:
The corrugated material has been there for the past week. It is potentially a health and safety issue, e g children have been playing on and around it, is also a trip hazard waiting to happen, as it is blocking part of the walkway in the communal area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springfield, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light on during the day, 7th June
item.description:
The lampost #PV110 is permantly on
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Middle Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree blocking Dollis Brook path, 7th June
item.description:
A large branch of a tree has fallen across the path beside the Dollis Brook not far from the footbridge near Dollis Road, partially obstructing the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eversleigh Road, West Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of litter from litter picking, 7th June
item.description:
Three council bags to be collected along the marshes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Riverway, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights on during the day, 7th June
item.description:
The lighting near Dexter House is on all day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John Fisher Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned fridge freezers on pavement, 7th June
item.description:
Been here two days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights on balcolnys not working, 7th June
item.description:
The lights on the outside of the balcolnies of 120-140 Mangold Way are not on at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mangold Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light in park or open space

item.title: Overgrown trees, 7th June
